title: Smartchime Doorbell Event Contract
description: Doorbell event published from Home Assistant to Smartchime via MQTT (topic: smartchime/events/doorbell). Triggers chime playback and AMOLED video display when active.

active.description: Whether the doorbell is currently ringing. true triggers chime + video playback; false stops video.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the event. Naive timestamps are assumed UTC.

video_url.description: RTSP stream or clip URL to display on the AMOLED screen. If omitted, the configured default_stream is used.
